What is this?

We don't just make rum cream.

We craft an experience rooted in Jamaican tradition, herbal knowledge, and modern refinement.

Not a trend.
Not a gimmick.
A living expression of Jamaican culture in liquid form.

Familiar…
yet entirely new

Jamaican Vybez Roots brings together carefully selected herbal roots and smooth cream liqueur to create something that carries the weight of generations — and the lightness of a perfect evening.

One taste and you'll understand why this can't be compared to anything else on the shelf.

The Experience

From the first pour, you feel it.

The warmth of aged rum.Settle in
The softness of cream.Feel it
The quiet depth of herbal roots working beneath the surface.Go deeper
Hints of spice.Awaken
Earth.Ground yourself
Sweetness that doesn't rush you — it settles you.Stay awhile

This is not a drink you rush through.
It's one you sit with.

The Origin

Where it
all started.

The house on the label
is the house behind
the brand.

Every bottle of Jamaican Vybez Roots carries more than a product — it carries a place. That wooden house on the hillside in Jamaica isn't just an image on a label. It's the physical origin of everything this brand stands for.

The roots were planted here — long before there was a bottle, a label, or a brand. This is what born from tradition truly means.

Kingston, Jamaica  ·  Est. 2020

What's Inside

The roots that matter

Infused with traditional Jamaican Herbal Roots Tonic — energizer, purifier, and tonic in every bottle.

Mauby Bark
Anti-inflammatory · Antioxidant
A potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant that may also help improve symptoms of depression and arthritis. Nature's quiet healer in every sip.
Sarsaparilla
Blood Purifier · Energy
Possesses anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, acts as a natural blood purifier, and provides an energy and stamina boost.
Strong Back
Tonic · Strength
A traditional tonic that strengthens the back, muscles, and reproductive organs — a Jamaican heritage root prized for generations.

The 750ml

The full
expression.

Our flagship 750ml bottle — the complete Jamaican Vybez Roots experience. Gold-foiled, hand-tagged, and carrying the full depth of the blend inside.

Born on the island. Made for the world. Built for moments that deserve something real.

Our Roots

Jamaica has always known the language of roots

Long before modern labels and bottles, there was knowledge passed through generations — of herbs, tonics, and natural balance. Remedies carried in memory. Rituals passed mother to child.

Jamaican Vybez Roots carries that legacy forward.

We honour the past without being trapped by it — blending tradition with craft, so the story can continue in a new form.

Every bottle is an act of preservation. A handshake between the old world and the new.

We honour the past without being trapped by it — blending tradition with craft, so the story can continue in a new form.
2020
Established · Kingston, Jamaica
Founded on a belief that Jamaican herbal knowledge deserves a place in the premium spirits market — authentic, uncompromising, and proud.

The Blend Carries

EnergizerRoots Tonic
Blood PurifierHeritage
Natural BalanceHerbal
Smooth WarmthRum Cream

The Craft

Built not just for taste —
but for integrity

Every batch is guided by precision and care. Shelf stability tested. Formulation developed for real-world distribution.

01
Balanced Herbal Extraction
Drawing the full spectrum of the plant's properties without compromise — traditional method, precise execution.
02
Controlled Infusion Process
Time and temperature managed with precision to bind root character with cream and rum in a seamless, stable blend.
03
Refined Cream Integration
Smooth, consistent texture across every bottle. No separation. No shortcuts. No compromise on the final feel.
04
Consistency Across Production
From the first batch to the thousandth — the experience never changes. That's the promise in every bottle.
Shelf Stability Tested
Distribution Ready
Food-Grade Formulation
BSJ Compliance Pathway

Who It's For

This is for the ones
who move differently

Value
Culture over hype
Seek
Experience over noise
Choose
Depth over surface

Whether shared in a moment, or enjoyed in quiet reflection —
Jamaican Vybez Roots is made to be part of your rhythm.

Stories & Updates

The Vybez Journal

All Entries →
Origin Story  ·  Est. 2020

From a hillside in Jamaica
to a bottle the world will know

Every great brand begins somewhere real. Ours begins on a hillside — with roots pulled from the earth, knowledge passed through generations, and a vision that refused to stay quiet. This is the story of how Jamaican Vybez Roots came to be.

Read the Origin Story
The Craft  ·  Production

Why we chose roots over flavouring — and what that means for every bottle

The easy path was artificial flavouring. We chose the harder road — real Jamaican herbal roots, traditional extraction, and a process that cannot be faked or shortcut.

Read More
Culture  ·  Heritage

Roots tonics and the Jamaican tradition that the world hasn't fully discovered yet

Long before wellness culture discovered herbal tonics, Jamaicans were already living it. Mauby bark, sarsaparilla, strong back — these aren't trends. They're a legacy.

Read More

St. Catherine, Jamaica  ·  Coming Soon

A Unique
Jamaican Destination

The JVR Production Viewing Experience — where manufacturing excellence meets culture, hospitality, and innovation. See every bottle come to life.

Transparent Educational Engaging Jamaican

The Experience Flow

Six steps.
One unforgettable journey.

From welcome to restaurant — every moment in the JVR facility is designed to connect you to the craft, the culture, and the people behind the bottle.

01
🤝
Welcome & Orientation
Guests receive a personal introduction to JVR — the brand story, the mission, and what awaits them inside the facility.
02
👁
View the Process
Walk the glass-panelled viewing corridor overlooking live production — mixing, blending, homogenization, bottling, and labelling in real time.
03
📖
Learn & Engage
Informational displays bring the ingredients, heritage, and techniques to life — making every visitor an informed ambassador of the brand.
04
🥃
Tasting Experience
A guided tasting of Jamaican Vybez Roots products — understanding the blend, the roots, and the craft through direct sensory experience.
05
🛍
Retail Shop
Purchase exclusive JVR products, limited editions, and branded merchandise — items only available at the facility itself.
06
🍽
Restaurant Experience
Complete the journey with Jamaican-inspired cuisine in our on-site restaurant, with direct views of the production facility.

Facility Layout

Designed for transparency

Every zone in the JVR facility is purpose-built — production, viewing, retail, tasting, and dining working together as one seamless experience.

Production AreaCore Manufacturing
Viewing CorridorGlass-Panelled Observation
Retail & Tasting AreaExclusive Products
Raw Material StorageControlled Environment
Packaging & StorageDispatch Ready
RestaurantJamaican Cuisine

Key Features

Built to build trust

Tempered glass viewing panels for safety and food hygiene compliance
Dedicated viewing corridor with railings — no direct access to production floor
Climate controlled for visitor comfort throughout the facility
Food safety standards compliant — designed with BSJ regulatory alignment
Drives foot traffic, retail, and restaurant revenue — a complete destination model

Perfect For Every Occasion

Gift the Vybez

From intimate gatherings to holiday celebrations — Jamaican Vybez Roots is the gift that carries culture, warmth, and a story worth sharing.

The Single
200ml · Signature Gift
The perfect introduction to the Vybez. A single bottle wrapped in our signature burlap and gold foil — elegant, personal, and unforgettable.
Perfect for personal gifting
The Holiday Set
Dual Bottle · Seasonal Special
Two bottles beautifully presented — ideal for Christmas, New Year, and special celebrations. A gift that brings the island spirit to any occasion.

Premium · Full Collection
